__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    getStatus:
      path: /status
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      response:
        docs: Status
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - response:
            body: string
    getAgentThinkModels:
      path: /agent/think
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      response:
        docs: Agent think models
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      url: Base
      examples:
        - response:
            body: string
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml

agentChannel.yml.rawContents:
channel:
  path: /v1/agent/converse
  url: Agent
  auth: false
  messages:
    converse:
      origin: client
      body: string
  examples:
    - messages:
        - type: converse
          body: string

transcriptionChannel.yml.rawContents:
channel:
  path: /v1/listen
  url: Production
  auth: false
  messages:
    transcribe:
      origin: client
      body: string
  examples:
    - messages:
        - type: transcribe
          body: string

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Test API
environments:
  Production:
    urls:
      Base: https://api.example.com
      Agent: wss://agent.example.com
      Production: wss://api.example.com
  Agent:
    urls:
      Base: https://agent.example.com
      Agent: wss://agent.example.com
      Production: wss://api.example.com
default-environment: Production
default-url: Base
